topic: The chairs at my dining table are pulled out a little more every day as if someone keeps sitting down
title: The Chairs at My Dining Table Are Pulled Out a Little More Every Day | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every morning the chairs at my dining table are pulled out a little more. As if someone keeps sitting down.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a wooden dining table surrounded by chairs all pulled slightly out, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I live alone. Six chairs, one table. I only ever use one.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a modest dining room with a table and six chairs, dim evening light, one place setting, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I push them all in at night.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of hands pushing a wooden dining chair neatly under a table, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One morning all six were out a few inches. Evenly. Neatly.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a dining table with all six chairs pulled out a few inches evenly, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a dining chair being pushed back to the table, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By noon they had crept out again.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of dining chairs crept out from the table again, dim noon light through a window, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I marked the floor with tape.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of tape marks on a wooden floor around chair legs, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each dawn the chairs sit farther from the table than the marks.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of dining chairs sitting beyond the floor tape marks, dim dawn light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Now they face inward, angled, like five guests leaning toward the empty head of the table.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of five dining chairs angled inward toward the empty head of a table, dim light, deep shadows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night the seat cushions were warm and dented when I came down for water.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a dented warm seat cushion on a dining chair, dim night light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I moved the chairs to the garage and ate standing up.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an empty dining room with no chairs, only a bare table, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning all six were back at the table. Pulled out. Waiting for me to sit.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of six chairs back around the dining table, all pulled out and waiting, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
